name: sendoff-laptop
description: Commission delivery: pull the sprite from staging, pack it with the gif, upload to the client's Drive folder, get the link.
author: Justin

scripts.shots: cross-env SENDOFF_MOCK=1 SENDOFF_SHOT_DIR=shots SENDOFF_WATCH_DIR=shots/watch electron-vite dev
scripts.shots:photo: cross-env SENDOFF_MOCK=1 SENDOFF_PRESET=photo SENDOFF_SHOT_DIR=shots-photo SENDOFF_WATCH_DIR=shots-photo/watch electron-vite dev
scripts.shots:wizard: cross-env SENDOFF_FORCE_SETUP=1 SENDOFF_WIZARD_DIR=shots-wizard/folder SENDOFF_SHOT_DIR=shots-wizard electron-vite dev
